    Remove USB device ID added by SVN r150701 in the CDC USB ethernet driver.
    Since then, the FreeBSD USB stack has got proper USB RNDIS support.

    PR:             254345
    MFC after:      1 week
    Sponsored by:   Mellanox Technologies // NVIDIA Networking
